summary: Frontend-only testing of Carter's Care platform portal upgrades. Verified: Login page renders correctly with form validation, 404 page with navigation, protected routes redirect to login, mobile responsiveness, TypeScript compilation passes. Unable to test authenticated features (sidebar navigation, new pages, Maureen chatbot) due to no test credentials available.

issues: Vite shows @import warnings in logs but fonts are loaded via HTML head - warnings are from stale cache/build. Non-blocking.

action_items: Create test credentials file at /app/memory/test_credentials.md for future testing of authenticated features
Consider adding data-testid attributes to sidebar navigation items for easier testing
critical_code_review_comments: All new page files exist and TypeScript compiles without errors (StaffHR, StaffTraining, ClientCarePlans, ClientRisk, MyRoster, MyTimesheets)
App.tsx correctly defines all new routes: /staff, /staff/hr, /staff/training, /staff/compliance, /clients, /clients/care-plans, /clients/risk, /my-roster, /my-compliance, /my-timesheets
AppSidebar.tsx implements collapsible navigation groups for Staff and Clients with proper state management
Sidebar scroll fix implemented using useRef and useEffect to preserve scroll position on navigation
AIChatbot.tsx uses Maureen's photo (maureen.png) for floating button and chat header - correctly shows only when logged in (inside AppLayout)
New pages use mock data for demo purposes (training completion, roster shifts, timesheets) - MOCKED
Protected routes correctly redirect to login when not authenticated
Login form validation working: email format validation, password length validation, password visibility toggle
context_for_next_testing_agent: All unauthenticated features verified working. To test authenticated features (sidebar navigation, new pages, Maureen chatbot), test credentials are needed. The app uses Supabase authentication. New pages use MOCK data for training completion, roster shifts, and timesheets. ESLint shows TypeScript parsing errors but TypeScript compiler passes - this is a non-blocking ESLint config issue.

details: Login page renders correctly with all data-testid attributes
Form validation shows 'Please enter a valid email' for invalid email format
Password visibility toggle works correctly (password -> text)
Mobile responsiveness working - form accessible on mobile viewport
404 page renders correctly with data-testid attributes
Attempted path is displayed on the page
/staff route correctly redirects to /login when not authenticated
All protected routes use ProtectedRoute component
npx tsc --noEmit completed with exit code 0

sidebar_navigation.reason: Requires authentication - no test credentials available
code_review: AppSidebar.tsx implements collapsible groups for Staff and Clients
Scroll position preservation implemented using useRef and useEffect

Navigation items include: Dashboard, Staff (All Staff, HR & Onboarding, Training, Compliance), Clients (All Clients, Care Plans, Risk & Safety), Shifts, Records, My Profile (My Roster, My Certs, My Timesheets), Finance, Settings

details: Chatbot trigger NOT visible on login page (expected - only shows when logged in)
code_review: Floating button shows Maureen's photo with online indicator
Chat panel header shows Maureen's photo with name 'Maureen' and subtitle 'Your Care Assistant'
data-testid attributes present: maureen-chat-trigger, maureen-chat-panel, maureen-chat-close, maureen-chat-input, maureen-chat-send

mocked_features.my_roster_shifts: MyRoster.tsx returns mock shift data in useQuery
